title: Scaling Distributed Systems with Go
description: Learn the patterns and pitfalls of building highly available systems that scale to millions of users using Go's concurrency primitives.

title: The Future of CSS: Container Queries and Beyond
description: Deep dive into the latest CSS features that are changing the way we approach responsive design and component architecture.

title: Machine Learning for Web Developers
description: Explore how to integrate pre-trained ML models directly into your frontend applications using TensorFlow.js and ONNX.

title: Lunch Break
description: Enjoy a catered lunch and networking session in the main hall.

title: Security-First: Modern Auth Patterns
description: A comprehensive look at Passkeys, WebAuthn, and the transition away from traditional password-based authentication.

title: Building Accessible React Apps
description: Practical strategies for ensuring your React components are usable by everyone, covering focus management and ARIA best practices.

title: Observability at Scale
description: Moving beyond logs and metrics: How to implement distributed tracing and structured observability in complex microservices.
